title: Review: message_set update type validation and non-Object patch
notes:
Maintainer risk: LOW — the diff adds strict type validation consistently. One pre-existing semantics bug filed (deletedAt null) but not introduced by this diff. No new public API surface. No breaking changes beyond the readAt-null behavioral fix which was previously a silent lie to clients.
Confidence: 85% chance of no missed bug. Uncertainty driven by: not tracing all callers of the store methods to verify they handle all return value combinations; reactions/ handler remains permissive and was not fully audited. Would raise confidence if: integration test covered the deletedAt null / undelete path.
close_reason: All findings from this review fixed. Remaining permissive behaviors (emoji='?' default, non-validated timestamp strings) are intentional and pre-existing.
